title: Hardcore Revival Items
description: Add custom crafting recipe and item which revive players
body:
Died in your Hardcore world?
No worries — now you can revive yourself or your friends with craftable items!


This datapack adds:

 Revival Totem – Revives one random dead player

 
 Revival Beacon – Revives all dead players at once

✔️ Easily customizable — tweak recipes, effects, and logic as you like

🛠️ You may need to unzip the datapack to install it on a server or to modify it

📢 This is my first datapack, so if you find any bugs or glitches, please let me know on Discord!

Check gallery for recpies
